title: Protein Ice Cream
tagline: High protein, low calorie, actually tastes good.
description: Creamy protein ice cream using frozen bananas and protein powder. The fitness influencer secret that actually works. 25g protein per serving.
ingredients: 1 scoop vanilla or chocolate protein powder
steps: Freeze ripe bananas (the riper, the sweeter). Slice before freezing for easier blending.
Add frozen banana slices to a food processor or high-powered blender.
Add protein powder and a splash of milk. Pulse several times to break up bananas.
Blend until smooth and creamy, scraping down sides as needed. Add more milk 1 Tbsp at a time if too thick.
Add peanut butter or frozen berries if using. Pulse to combine.
Serve immediately for soft-serve texture, or freeze 30 min for firmer scoop.
notes: Use overripe bananas for best sweetness - the brown spots are your friend.
A food processor works better than most blenders for this texture.
Add cocoa powder for chocolate version without chocolate protein powder.
